verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If I only have one song that I could sing you Or a story I could tell before I leave If I only have one message I could bring you There's no question it would be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: About the cross About the blood About the place I found God's mercy and love And although it's bittersweet Remembering the cost There's something beautiful About the cross

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I could sing about the state of grace I live in And the peace and joy I have when times are tough And you'd see in all the blessings I've been given But in the end my life is just

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Two thousand years ago If I have watched Him die I think I would have lost all hope Demanding to know why But now I know the cross means everything And it's the greatest honor to sing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So I'll cherish that old rugged cross, Till my trophies at last I lay down; I will cling to the old rugged cross, And exchange it some day for a crown. There's something beautiful About the cross
